JavaScript bindings, event handling, build configurations, and library references for JerryScript on Mbed OS 5.

## Folders
- **[jerryscript-mbed](jerryscript-mbed/README.md)**: JavaScript bindings, event loop, launcher, library registry, and utility structures for JerryScript on Mbed OS.
- **[js](js/README.md)**: Controls LED flashing, detects button presses, and executes interval blinking with completion messages.
- **[source](source/README.md)**: Console, log, and fatal message handling, time retrieval, and JerryScript environment initialization on Mbed OS.
- **[tools](tools/README.md)**: Scripts and configurations for pin checking, code generation, and JSHint setup in an embedded environment.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control for the mbedos5 target.
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Makefile for building and managing the JerryScript target on Mbed OS 5 with configurable options.
- **[mbed-events.lib](mbed-events.lib.md)**: Library link to mbed-events for ARMmbed integration.
- **[mbed-os.lib](mbed-os.lib.md)**: Reference to the mbed OS library for the ARMmbed platform.
- **[mbed_app.json](mbed_app.json.md)**: Configuration for disabling UART hardware flow control on the NRF52_DK target.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions for building JerryScript on mbed OS 5 with supported boards and dependencies.
- **[template-mbedignore.txt](template-mbedignore.txt.md)**: Specifies directories to ignore in the build process for the mbed OS 5 target.
